languages.text: {n}В процессе установки имплантов некоторая часть блаженных мучеников погибла, ибо их нервная система не выдержала столь жестокой нагрузки. Однако, священная аугментика достаточно усилила способности тех из них, кто смог выжить, и пустующие камеры закрылись сами по себе, возвещая, что необходимая вычислительная мощность достигнута.{/n}

{n}During the implantation process, a portion of the blessed martyrs perished as their nervous systems could not endure the brutal strain. However, the sacred augmetics sufficiently empowered those who survived and the vacant cells sealed themselves, signifying that the requisite computational capacity had been attained.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}В процессе установки имплантов некоторая часть блаженных мучеников погибла, ибо их нервная система не выдержала столь жестокой нагрузки. Однако, священная аугментика достаточно усилила способности тех из них, кто смог выжить, и пустующие камеры закрылись сами по себе, возвещая, что необходимая вычислительная мощность достигнута.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}During the implantation process, a portion of the blessed martyrs perished, for their nervous systems could not endure the brutal strain. However, the sacred augmentics sufficiently empowered those who survived, and the vacant chambers sealed themselves, signifying that the requisite computational capacity had been attained.{/n}

{n}During the implantation process, a portion of the blessed martyrs perished, for their nervous systems could not endure the brutal strain. However, the sacred augmentics sufficiently empowered those who survived, and the vacant chambers sealed themselves, signifying that the requisite computational capacity had been attained.{/n}

{n}During the implantation process, a portion of the blessed martyrs perished as their nervous systems could not endure the brutal strain. However, the sacred augmetics sufficiently empowered those who survived and the vacant cells sealed themselves, signifying that the requisite computational capacity had been attained.{/n}

{n}During the implantation process, a portion of the blessed martyrs perished as their nervous systems could not endure the brutal strain. However, the sacred augmetics sufficiently empowered those who survived and the vacant cells sealed themselves, signifying that the requisite computational capacity had been attained.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ein Teil der gesegneten Märtyrer ist während der Implantation gestorben, da ihr Nervensystem der brutalen Belastung nicht gewachsen war. Allerdings stärkten die heiligen Augmentationen die Überlebenden hinreichend und die vakanten Zellen versiegelten sich selbst, um anzuzeigen, dass die erforderliche Rechenleistung erreicht war.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}During the implantation process, a portion of the blessed martyrs perished as their nervous systems could not endure the brutal strain. However, the sacred augmetics sufficiently empowered those who survived and the vacant cells sealed themselves, signifying that the requisite computational capacity had been attained.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein Teil der gesegneten Märtyrer ist während der Implantation gestorben, da ihr Nervensystem der brutalen Belastung nicht gewachsen war. Allerdings stärkten die heiligen Augmentationen die Überlebenden hinreichend und die vakanten Zellen versiegelten sich selbst, um anzuzeigen, dass die erforderliche Rechenleistung erreicht war.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Au cours du processus d'implantation, certains des martyrs bénis périrent lorsque leur système nerveux ne put endurer une procédure aussi brutale. Cependant, les augmétiques sacrés parvinrent à galvaniser les survivants suffisamment, et les cellules vides se scellèrent, indiquant que la capacité de calcul requise avait été atteinte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}During the implantation process, a portion of the blessed martyrs perished as their nervous systems could not endure the brutal strain. However, the sacred augmetics sufficiently empowered those who survived and the vacant cells sealed themselves, signifying that the requisite computational capacity had been attained.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Au cours du processus d'implantation, certains des martyrs bénis périrent lorsque leur système nerveux ne put endurer une procédure aussi brutale. Cependant, les augmétiques sacrés parvinrent à galvaniser les survivants suffisamment, et les cellules vides se scellèrent, indiquant que la capacité de calcul requise avait été atteinte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Durante el proceso de implantación, una porción de los mártires benditos murió cuando sus sistemas nerviosos no pudieron soportar la brutal carga. Sin embargo, los auméticos sagrados reforzaron a los supervivientes y las celdas vacantes se sellaron, lo que indicó que se había alcanzado la capacidad computacional requerida.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}During the implantation process, a portion of the blessed martyrs perished as their nervous systems could not endure the brutal strain. However, the sacred augmetics sufficiently empowered those who survived and the vacant cells sealed themselves, signifying that the requisite computational capacity had been attained.{/n}

Sin embargo, los auméticos sagrados reforzaron a los supervivientes y las celdas vacantes se sellaron, lo que indicó que se había alcanzado la capacidad computacional requerida.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İmplantasyon süreci sırasında kutsal şehitlerin bir kısmı, sinir sistemlerinin bu vahşi baskıya dayanamaması sonucu can verdi. Kutsal ogmetikler, hayatta kalanlara yeterince güç verdi. Boşalan hücreler, kendilerini mühürleyerek gerekli bilgisayım kapasitesine ulaşıldığını işaret etti.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}During the implantation process, a portion of the blessed martyrs perished as their nervous systems could not endure the brutal strain. However, the sacred augmetics sufficiently empowered those who survived and the vacant cells sealed themselves, signifying that the requisite computational capacity had been attained.{/n}

Kutsal ogmetikler, hayatta kalanlara yeterince güç verdi. Boşalan hücreler, kendilerini mühürleyerek gerekli bilgisayım kapasitesine ulaşıldığını işaret etti.{/n}

languages.text: {n}在植入过程中，部分蒙福的殉道者因神经系统无法承受极端的负荷而殒命。然而，神圣的植入物成功强化了部分幸存者的力量，空置的收容区则自行封闭，表明所需的运算能力终于达到了要求。{/n}
